component.name: RSync UI
component.summary: Configure, run and schedule rsync tasks

description.p: RSync UI is a graphical front-end for rsync. Set a source and destination (local or remote over SSH), toggle every rsync option through a clear interface, add include/exclude filters, and run tasks on demand or on a schedule.

ul.li: Full rsync coverage: archive mode and granular attributes, compression, deletion, backups, size and bandwidth limits, and a raw-flags escape hatch.
Import an existing rsync command and have the whole form filled in for you.
Live command preview and streaming output for every run.
Per-task scheduling with a built-in scheduler that keeps running in the system tray.
Run history with saved logs, and desktop notifications on completion.

screenshot.caption: Scheduling a task and previewing the command

description.p: Self-contained Flatpak: rsync and OpenSSH are bundled and run inside the sandbox.
